title: US Airline On-Time
subtitle: BTS ontime — pick a year for the snapshot. Requires the `ontime.fact_ontime` table.

panels.query: SELECT count() AS flights, uniqExact(Reporting_Airline) AS airlines, round(avg(DepDelayMinutes), 1) AS avg_delay, countIf(DepDel15 = 0 AND Cancelled = 0) / count() AS ontime_share, countIf(Cancelled = 1) AS cancelled FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE Year = {{year}}

panels.title: Top 10 airlines
panels.query: SELECT Reporting_Airline AS airline, count() AS flights, avgOrNull(DepDelayMinutes) AS avg_delay, countIf(DepDel15 = 0 AND Cancelled = 0) / count() AS ontime_share FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE Year = {{year}} GROUP BY airline ORDER BY flights DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 origin airports
panels.query: SELECT OriginCode AS origin, any(OriginCityName) AS city, count() AS flights, avgOrNull(DepDelayMinutes) AS avg_delay FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE Year = {{year}} GROUP BY origin ORDER BY flights DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Monthly flight volume
panels.query: SELECT formatDateTime(toDate(toString({{year}}) || '-' || lpad(toString(Month), 2, '0') || '-01'), '%b %Y') AS label, count() AS value FROM ontime.fact_ontime WHERE Year = {{year}} GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month
